message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "Application Layer" {
    component SubscriptionController as SC <<Controller>>
}

package "Domain Model Layer" {
    component SubscriptionServiceImpl as SSI <<Bean>>
}

package "Infrastructure Layer" {
    component JpaSubscriptionRepository as JSR <<Bean>>
    component SubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository as SPJR <<Repository>>
}

participant User
database Datastore

User -> SC : Request
activate SC
SC -> SSI : via SubscriptionService
activate SSI
SSI -> JSR : via SubscriptionRepository
activate JSR
JSR -> SPJR : via Spring data repository
activate SPJR
SPJR -> Datastore : Query
activate Datastore
Datastore --> SPJR : Result
deactivate Datastore
SPJR --> JSR : Result
deactivate SPJR
JSR --> SSI : Result
deactivate JSR
SSI --> SC : Response
deactivate SSI
SC --> User : Response
deactivate SC

@enduml
```
